summary: Completed comprehensive testing of F1RECHAT social platform (v2). All 21 specified features working perfectly. Backend APIs 100% functional, frontend flows excellent, admin panel fully operational.
passed_tests: Backend: Email verification flow (mocked), complete registration, username+password login, admin verification, admin users list with plain_password field, friend endpoints, invalid login protection

Frontend: F1RECHAT logo and branding, username+password login fields (NOT email), multi-step registration (email → verify → complete profile), admin panel with password protection, user management (view passwords, edit/delete buttons), friends sidebar and search, chat area, logout/login flow
Auth: JWT tokens with httpOnly cookies, session management, admin control panel authentication
UI/UX: Dark theme, F1RECHAT branding, responsive design, 'Made with Emergent' badge correctly removed
Admin Features: Password verification with 'F1RE88HAMZA8ADMIN', user list display, password visibility toggles, edit/delete user controls
